escalation.rationale: Khamenei funeral draws millions with 'revenge' calls against US/Israel, Red Sea shipping attacks resume near Hodeidah, Trump-Putin-Zelenskyy diplomatic triangle intensifies ahead of NATO Turkey summit, and China-Russia joint naval drills announced, collectively sustaining elevated multi-theater tension.

ticker_items: Trump offers Ukraine peace 'solutions' in 90-min Putin call ahead of NATO summit.
Millions gather in Tehran for Khamenei funeral; Iranian commanders warn US and Israel.
Cargo ship attacked in Red Sea off Hodeidah; UKMTO issues caution advisory.
Ukraine strikes Russian-occupied Crimea; one killed per Moscow-installed officials.
China and Russia announce joint naval exercises and Pacific patrols for July.

eastern_europe.description: Ukrainian attack on Russian-occupied Crimea killed one person according to Moscow-installed officials.
Russia launched a combined drone-and-missile attack on Kyiv as reported in conflict thread updates.

middle_east.description: A cargo ship reported being under attack in the Red Sea off the coast of Yemen near Hodeidah; UKMTO issued a caution advisory.

claimed_totals.claim: Deaths in Iran from US-Israel attacks
Deaths in Lebanon from US-Israel attacks
Deaths in Gulf states from US-Israel attacks
North Korean (DPRK) troops KIA at Kursk

russia.text: Trump made the offer during the 'business-like and quite constructive' call in the context of his participation next week at the NATO summit in Turkey.
russia.speaker: Yuri Ushakov
russia.title: Kremlin Aide

russia.text: Kyiv is engaged in terrorism following drone strikes on oil terminals.
russia.speaker: Kremlin spokesperson
russia.title: Kremlin

ukraine.text: Progress made, but no swift victory over Russia.
ukraine.speaker: Oleksandr Syrsky
ukraine.title: Commander-in-Chief, Ukrainian Armed Forces

middle_east.text: The alliance operates on a principle of consensus rather than 'blind obedience.'
middle_east.speaker: Boris Pistorius
middle_east.title: German Defense Minister

middle_east.text: Iran calls for the creation of a joint security mechanism among Islamic countries; the presence of extra-regional forces has become a source of instability.
middle_east.speaker: Iran Acting Defense Minister
middle_east.title: Acting Defense Minister of Iran

observers.description: President Trump held separate 90-minute calls with Putin and Zelenskyy, offering to help 'find solutions' to the Ukraine war ahead of the NATO summit in Turkey. The US is simultaneously managing Iran post-conflict dynamics following the US-Israel war and pressing NATO allies for 'loyalty' pledges.

China announced joint naval exercises and Pacific patrols with Russia scheduled for July. Xi Jinping received congratulatory messages from North Korea's Kim Jong Un, reinforcing the China-DPRK-Russia alignment narrative.

Russia continues active combat operations in Ukraine including drone and missile strikes on Kyiv, while also closing rail crossings into the Baltic states. Putin engaged Trump diplomatically while the Kremlin accused Ukraine of 'terrorism' over oil terminal drone strikes.

Millions gathered in Tehran for the multi-day funeral of assassinated Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, with crowds calling for 'revenge' against the US. Senior Iranian commanders warned the US and Israel against carrying out any attacks during the funeral period; Iran's acting defense minister called for an Islamic security alliance against Israel in talks with Turkey.

Israel is reported as not withdrawing from Lebanon, with framework withdrawal tied to Hezbollah disarmament creating a deadlock. Israel revealed it provided Iron Dome batteries to the UAE during the Iran war, and Netanyahu may visit the US as early as next week per Trump hints.

Defense Minister Boris Pistorius publicly rejected Trump's demand for NATO 'loyalty,' stating the alliance runs on consensus, not blind obedience. Germany continues to navigate tension between US alliance management and European defense autonomy ahead of the Turkey NATO summit.

Reports indicate DPRK troops fighting at Kursk suffered approximately 70% casualties. Kim Jong Un sent Xi Jinping congratulatory messaging reinforcing the Pyongyang-Beijing relationship amid ongoing DPRK military deployment with Russian forces.

Turkey is hosting the upcoming NATO summit where Trump-Putin-Ukraine diplomacy will be a central issue. Ankara is also in dialogue with Iran's acting defense minister on regional security mechanisms, positioning itself as a key regional interlocutor.

Israel confirmed providing Iron Dome air defense batteries to the UAE during the Iran war to protect Emirati citizens. The UAE is also reportedly considering purchasing Indian BrahMos cruise missiles, drawing lessons from the recent Iran conflict.

financial.notes: Strait of Hormuz reported open again but global supply chain recovery expected to take the better part of a year; renewed Red Sea shipping attacks near Hodeidah add fresh maritime risk premium pressure.

update_log.text: China and Russia announce joint naval exercises and Pacific patrols for July 2026.
Cargo ship attacked in Red Sea off Hodeidah; UKMTO issues caution advisory for Bab el-Mandeb Strait.
Millions gather in Tehran for second day of Khamenei funeral ceremonies; Iranian commander warns US and Israel against attacks.
Trump holds separate calls with Putin and Zelenskyy ahead of NATO Turkey summit, offering Ukraine peace 'solutions.'
Ukrainian strike on Crimea kills one person, per Moscow-installed officials; Kremlin labels attacks 'terrorism.'
German Defense Minister Pistorius rejects Trump's NATO 'loyalty' demand, says alliance based on consensus.
Israel confirmed to have provided Iron Dome batteries to UAE during Iran war; Netanyahu potential US visit next week per Trump.
Al Jazeera casualty tracker confirms ~3,468 killed in Iran, ~3,696 in Lebanon from US-Israel attacks as of June 10.
Ukraine's Syrsky states progress made in war but no swift victory expected; war of attrition likely to continue.
